generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that communities like yours are stepping up to build local resilience networks? In places like Maplewood, neighbors are organizing emergency preparedness workshops that actually strengthen community bonds. It's not about fear—it's about practical readiness. Why not check if your area has something similar? #CommunityPreparedness #NeighborhoodWatch
